basic_details.job_title: GHSS Lanji Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Govt Higher Secondary School Lanji (GHSS Lanji) Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 11 June 2026 on the official website https://nuapada.odisha.gov.in. Various Guest Faculty vacancies have been announced through the GHSS Lanji Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade, B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi
qualification.details: Master Degree in concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade and B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi.

salary_details.details: Rs. 20000 Per Month Rs.400/- per class subject to max Rs.20000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GHSS Lanji Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://nuapada.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download GHSS Lanji Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty posts at GHSS Lanji?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Faculty posts at GHSS Lanji is 17th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade, along with a B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Guest Faculty positions is 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 20000 per month, calculated at Rs. 400/- per class subject to the monthly maximum.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by sending the completed application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Which subjects are available for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The available subjects for Guest Faculty positions include Odia, English, Economics, History, Political Science, and Sociology.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form and the official notification?
faq.answer: The application form and official notification can be downloaded from the official website of Nuapada District, Odisha.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is REC/001/26.
